content:
💡 OSS-DocumentScanner | C++
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide users with a powerful and open-source mobile application for digitizing physical documents and extracting text from them.
✨ Key Features: • Document scanning with edge detection and perspective correction • Optical Character Recognition (OCR) using Tesseract • Barcode scanning using ZXing C++ • PDF generation from scanned documents • Image processing for document enhancement
📖 Summary: This repository hosts two open-source applications: OSS Document Scanner, an Android app for scanning documents, and Oss CardWallet, an app for managing digital cards. Both apps leverage advanced image processing and OCR technologies.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
